task_completion.description: Verify the campaign 'Summer Clearance 2024' is created in Vtiger CRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Summer Clearance 2024' in the Campaign Name field on the creation form, detail view, or in the Campaigns list view.

task_completion.description: Verify the Campaign Type, Status, and Closing Date are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Email' in the Campaign Type field, 'Planning' in the Campaign Status field, and '2024-07-31' in the Expected Close Date field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Expected Revenue, Budget Cost, and Target Size are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '50000' in the Expected Revenue field, '5000' in the Budget Cost field, and '500' in the Target Size field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Assigned To and Description fields are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Admin' (or Administrator) in the Assigned To field, and the text 'Email campaign for summer clearance sale with up to 40% discount on selected inventory items.' in the Description text area.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 2 existing contacts are associated with the campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Contacts' related list or tab within the 'Summer Clearance 2024' campaign details showing at least 2 contact records linked to it.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Vtiger CRM application running in a web browser, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show actual interaction with Vtiger CRM form fields and buttons, not a notepad or text editor application.

integrity.description: Verify contacts were associated using the CRM's relational features.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Vtiger 'Select Contacts' popup window or the related list view being used, rather than the agent just typing contact names into a generic text field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The campaign must exactly match these values: Campaign Name: 'Summer Clearance 2024', Campaign Type: 'Email', Campaign Status: 'Planning', Closing Date: '2024-07-31', Expected Revenue: '50000', Budget Cost: '5000', Target Size: '500', Assigned To: 'Admin', Description: 'Email campaign for summer clearance sale with up to 40% discount on selected inventory items.' Additionally, the campaign must have at least 2 contacts associated with it via the CRM's related lists.
